raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "ne irr starp tavut Brahtu Mei-
tahin weenaSeewa/un starp wiꞥ-
feem manueem Lautdim/ ka tu no-
ej weenu Seewu xemt no teem
Wihtistexeem teem Neapgrati-
teem? un Simsans fazzija usfa-
wu Tehwu: Xem tu man wiꞥ-
nu/ jo winna patihk mannahin
Azzim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Bet winna Tehwsun wiꞥ-
na Mahte ne sinnaja to paschu
no ta KUNGA eſſam / ka wiꞥsch
Eemeftus mekletu pee teem Wi-
htistexeem / jo tee Wihtistexi wal-
dja tanni Laika pahr Israełu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Tad nogahje Simsans ar
fawu Tehwu un ar fawu Mahti
us Tiinnatu. Kad tee nu pee Tim-
natas Wiha-Kalneem nahze/re-
dsi/ tad ruhze weens jauns Lau-
wa winnam pretti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Un ta KUNGA Gars nah-
ze pahr winnu / un wiꞥsch fa-
plohsija to/ itt ka Kaslens tohp
faplohſihts/ un winna Rohkā ne
bija ne kahds Rihks/. tomehr
wiꞥsch ne paſazzija fawam Teh-
wam nedg fawai Mahtei / ko
wiꞥsch bij darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Un wiꞥsch nonahze un run-
naja ar to Seetwu/ un ta patikke
Simsana Azzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un pehz kahdahm Deenahm
atgreeſahs wiꞥsch winnu xemt /
tad atkahpahs wiꞥsch no Zeffa ta
Lauwas Mattu raudsibt/ un reds/
eekſch ta Lauwa Mattas bija
weens Bischu-Pulks ar Meddu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Un wiꞥsch xehme to fawās
Rohkās/ un gahje prohjam / un
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Kad nu winna Tehws pee
tahs Seetwas nonahzis btja/ tad
darrija Simsans tur Kahsas / jo
ta tee Jaunekti zeenija darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Un kad tee winnu redſeja
tad dabbuja tee trihsdefinitis Bee-
drus/ kas pee winna buhtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Tad fazzija Simsans ue
teem : Es dohſchu jums weenu
Mihklu minneht / kad juhs to
man fhinnis feptix Kahsu Dee-
nās stahstifeet un atminnesfeit /
tad dohſchu es jums trihsdefinitis
Kreklus no finalka Andekla / un
trihsdefinitis Swehtku-Drchbes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Un ja juhs man to ne war-
refeet atminneht/ tad jums man-
bubs doht trihsdefmits Kreklus
no finalka Andekla / un trihsdef-
mits Swehtku-Drchbes / un tee
fazzija us winnu : pasakki taiwu
Mihklu/ lai mehs to dsirdain.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Tad fazzija wiꞥsch ue
teem : Barriba isgahje no ta
Rihjeja/ un Saldums isgahje no
ta Stipra. Un tee ne warreja to
Mihklu eekſch trim Deenahm at-
minneht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Un feptitā Deenā fazzija
tee us Simsana Seewu: Pahr-
runna tavun Wihru / ka wiꞥsch
muins to Mihklu stahsta/ ka mehs
teiv un tava Tehwa Nammu at
Uggumi ne fadedsinajam / effa-
juhs muhs aizinaifscht. muhf
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
